heading: Notification of benefits
label: 3915 Notification of benefits
text: The Secretary concerned shall ensure that notice of the benefits accorded by this chapter is provided in writing to persons in military service and to persons entering military service.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to section 515 of the former Appendix to this title prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.
